title: backend: k8cache: Bypass non-API cluster paths
author: Nabsku

findings.description: IsAuthBypassURL still uses strings.Contains for /version, /healthz, etc. A resource named 'version-tracker' at a valid API path would match the /version substring check, causing the new cacheMiddlewareHandler bypass to fire for a legitimate cacheable resource. The promised path-structure fix has not been committed.
IsKubernetesResourceAPIPath cleanly handles both direct and proxied API paths with 6 explicit test cases.
TestCacheMiddleware_BypassesNonKubernetesAPIPaths regression test directly covers the reported /healthz and /readyz failure scenarios.
